title: rubus × roscidus
intro: Rubus × roscidus, also known as raspberry leaf, is a perennial plant that is a hybrid of the wild raspberry and the black raspberry. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, offering several health benefits such as reducing menstrual cramps, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Rubus × roscidus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often recommended for women's health and reproductive issues.
